title: Anti-HBG1/2 Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: Rabbit monoclonal antibody validated for WB, IHC-P, and ICC/IF against human hemoglobin subunits gamma-1 and gamma-2.
description: High-affinity rabbit monoclonal antibody raised against recombinant human HBG1/HBG2. Suitable for western blot, immunohistochemistry (paraffin), and immunocytochemistry with published protocols.

title: Anti-GAPDH Mouse Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: Loading control antibody for western blot and general cell biology applications.
description: Mouse monoclonal antibody recognizing GAPDH. Broad species reactivity makes it a dependable housekeeping control.
storage: Store at 4°C short term; -20°C long term.

title: Anti-β-Actin Rabbit Polyclonal Antibody
short_description: Polyclonal antibody to β-actin for western blot and immunofluorescence.
description: Rabbit polyclonal antibody raised against a synthetic peptide mapping to a conserved region of β-actin.

title: Anti-Ki-67 Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: Proliferation marker for IHC and flow cytometry.
description: Rabbit monoclonal antibody to Ki-67 nuclear antigen. Optimized for formalin-fixed paraffin-embedded tissue.

title: Anti-CD3ε Rabbit Monoclonal Antibody
short_description: T-cell marker for IHC and multiplex imaging panels.
description: Rabbit monoclonal antibody to CD3 epsilon chain. Compatible with multiplex immunofluorescence workflows.
